title: Orianagroovy128/Sara-the-ai-assistant
summary: Control your desktop with voice commands using this offline Python assistant powered by local LLMs and Whisper speech recognition.

title: ManOfDiamond/adapt-ai
summary: A hardware-aware local AI assistant. Adapt AI profiles your machine's RAM/VRAM, recommends a locally-runnable Ollama model based on what your hardware can actually handle, and gives you a full chat workspace: streaming responses, file attachments, and in-browser Python execution.

title: JWhite212/context-recall
summary: macOS daemon that auto-detects Teams meetings, transcribes locally with faster-whisper, and produces structured summaries via Local Modals or Claude API

title: thClaws/thClaws
summary: Open-source AI agent harness in native Rust — GUI, CLI, headless, and webapp from one binary. Multi-provider, MCP, skills, plugins, agent teams.

title: CypherMorgan/qpilot
summary: AI-powered Quality Engineering Platform built with FastAPI, React, PostgreSQL, and Docker for requirement analysis, API test generation, and automation failure analysis.

title: imDarshanGK/localmind
summary: Offline AI assistant - chat with your documents locally. No cloud, no API key, no data leaks. Built with Python + FastAPI + Ollama + LangChain.

title: PIXELL07/Agent-Guardrail-Proxy
summary: Transparent AI guardrail proxy for detecting prompt injection attacks and securing LLM agent tool calls.

title: kytmanov/synto
summary: More than just Karpathy’s LLM Wiki, 100% local with Ollama. Drop Markdown notes → AI extracts concepts → your Obsidian wiki auto-links and grows. Zero sharing. Your notes stay yours.

title: romanr3314/designpull

title: shopfloormelampsoralini924/docker-ollama

title: johnnichev/selectools
summary: Production-ready Python framework for AI agents with built-in guardrails, audit logging, cost tracking, and hybrid RAG. Supports OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Ollama. By NichevLabs.

title: r3dbars/nightshift
summary: Put your idle AI hardware to work while you sleep. Overnight, your machines scan the repo, draft safe work, and hand you a ranked morning brief. Drafts, not deploys. Local-first, MIT.

title: Tlahey/git-manager

title: Magna81202/XimVerse
